traits.locale_text: Weapon Skill is increased by +<u>(Tech Use / 10)</u> or +<u>(number of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks / 10)</u>, whichever is higher.
Weapon Skill is increased by +<u>(Tech-Use / 10)</u> or +<u>(number of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks / 10)</u>, whichever is higher.

{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближний Бой{/g} увеличичен на +<u>({g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Техника{/g} / 10)</u> или +<u>(2 × число уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g})</u> — в зависимости от того, какое значение выше.

{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближний Бой{/g} увеличичен на +<u>({g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Техника{/g} / 10)</u> или +<u>(2 × число уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g})</u> — в зависимости от того, какое значение выше.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g} erhöht sich um +<u>({g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Einsatz{/g} / 10)</u> oder +<u>(2 × Zahl der {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}-Stapel)</u> (je nachdem was höher ist).

languages.text: La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g} aumenta en +<u>({g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Uso de tecnología{/g} / 10)</u> o +<u>(2 x número de acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g})</u>, lo que sea mayor.

traits.locale_text: La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g} aumenta en +<u>({g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Uso de tecnología{/g} / 10)</u> o +<u>(2 x número de acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g})</u>, lo que sea mayor.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g}, +<u>({g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tekno Aşinalığı{/g} / 10)</u> veya +<u>(2 x {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi sayısı)</u> (hangisi yüksekse) kadar artar.
